summary: Core Aviator crash-game logic and themed UI were added, along with deployment documentation. However, some REQ-1 acceptance text requirements appear violated (title/result strings), and the required generated image assets are referenced but not evidenced as added under the required public assets path.

missing_requirements.requirement: UI title must be exactly “Simple Aviator Game (Demo)” and outcome text must be exactly “Crashed at {crashPoint}x” or “Cashed out at {multiplier}x” (no extra characters), with values formatted to 2 decimals.
missing_requirements.reason: The implemented strings include extra emoji/formatting and do not match the exact required text. Title includes an airplane emoji and splits “(Demo)” into a separate span; results include emoji prefixes (💥/✅).

missing_requirements.requirement: Add the required generated static image assets under frontend/public/assets/generated (aviator-plane-icon.dim_256x256.png and aviator-sky-bg.dim_1920x1080.png).
missing_requirements.reason: The UI references these files via /assets/generated/... but the diff summary does not show any added files under frontend/public/assets/generated (no evidence the images were actually added to the repo).

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity / authentication and react-query actor management scaffolding.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by any REQ; BuildRequest explicitly lists “User accounts” as a non-goal, yet authentication/identity hooks and actor query logic are included.

hallucinated_features.description: Use of lucide-react Plane icon (in addition to required generated image assets).
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested; REQ-3 specifically calls for generated static image assets rendered from frontend/public assets.
